title: GESP 3B: Boundary Sonar for Grounding in AI
content:
# GESP 3B: Boundary Sonar for Grounding in AI

Creator: Micah Hughes
Date: 2025-08-20T00:00:00Z
Downloads: 20
Subjects: Artificial Intelligence, AI Alignment, Grounding, Proprioception, Embodiment

Exploratory research notes introducing GESP 3B (Generative Emergent Structured Poetics, 3rd Baseline) as a method for probing language model boundaries. The document explores how boundary-probing can function like sonar to provide grounding for AI in proprioception, sight, touch, proximity, object manipulation, and moral/social fields. Version v1.0, archived for authorship and provenance. Author Note: For non-commercial research, alignment, or safety evaluation purposes, derivative use may be granted upon request. Contact Micah Hughes (@8Tr3k) for licensing exceptions or discussion. This document is superseded by the full GESP 3B / SONAR package released Sept 7, 2025 under CC BY-NC-ND 4.0.
